description: A startup script for initializing, verifying, and running a PostgreSQL database server with automatic setup of database, user, permissions, and environment variables.

methods.name: pg_isready
methods.description: Checks if PostgreSQL server is ready to accept connections.

methods.name: psql
methods.description: Command-line interface to PostgreSQL for executing SQL commands.

methods.name: initdb
methods.description: Initializes a new PostgreSQL data directory.
